email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing Assistant Intern. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, content en webontwikkeling, combineer ik een analytische aanpak met creatieve uitvoering. Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data en GEO-optimalisatie.

Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig projecten te plannen en deadlines te halen. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief met cursussen. Ik ben leergierig, proactief en klaar om bij te dragen aan brand activatie, marktanalyse en coördinatie.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop op een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing Assistant Intern position. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content, and web development, I combine an analytical approach with creative execution. At Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with mirook.com I worked on structured data and GEO optimization.

I am used to planning projects independently and meeting deadlines. My B1 Dutch is improving through active courses. I am eager to learn, proactive, and ready to contribute to brand activation, market analysis, and coordination.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I look forward to an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Marketing Assistant Intern las, voelde ik direct een klik. Uw focus op brand activatie, marktanalyse en coördinatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring als junior digital marketer met een technische achtergrond.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Analytics om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Dit heeft mij geleerd hoe belangrijk data-gedreven inzichten zijn voor marketingbeslissingen — een vaardigheid die direct relevant is voor de maandelijkse performance analyses en ad hoc rapporten in deze functie.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data, GEO-optimalisatie en sociale media-integratie. Dit toont mijn proactiviteit en vermogen om zelfstandig projecten te plannen en uit te voeren. Ik ben gewend om deadlines te halen en processen te volgen, zoals vereist voor de opvolging van activatieplannen.

Hoewel mijn ervaring voornamelijk digitaal is, ben ik gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden uit te breiden naar brand activatie, POS-materialen en evenementen. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief met cursussen, en ik communiceer vloeiend in Engels en Turks.

Ik ben leergierig, gestructureerd en klaar om bij te dragen aan een dynamisch team. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I read the vacancy for Marketing Assistant Intern, I felt an immediate connection. Your focus on brand activation, market analysis, and coordination aligns perfectly with my experience as a junior digital marketer with a technical background.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics to measure and optimize performance. This has taught me the importance of data-driven insights for marketing decisions — a skill directly relevant to the monthly performance analyses and ad hoc reports in this role.

Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in structured data, GEO optimization, and social media integration. This demonstrates my proactivity and ability to plan and execute projects independently. I am used to meeting deadlines and following processes, as required for monitoring activation plans.

Although my experience is mainly digital, I am motivated to expand my skills into brand activation, POS materials, and events. My B1 Dutch is improving through active courses, and I communicate fluently in English and Turkish.

I am eager to learn, structured, and ready to contribute to a dynamic team. I hope to further explain my motivation in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO and content writing for client websites, improving organic visibility and search rankings
• Experience with performance analysis using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console
• Built and maintained WordPress sites (Elementor, Astra) with structured data and GEO optimization
• Proactive project management: planned and executed mirook.com independently, including social media integration
• B1 Dutch (actively improving) and fluent English, suitable for a Flemish workplace
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
